name: clicker-game
description: Clicker game with microservices, API gateway, and Docker

scripts.dev: concurrently -n user,state,engine,gateway -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm start --prefix services/user-service" "npm start --prefix services/game-state-service" "npm start --prefix services/game-engine-service" "npm start --prefix services/api-gateway"
